title: Booking a hotel room
explanation:
Booking a hotel room

Transcript

Receptionist: Good afternoon, Grand Hotel. How can I help you?
Guest: Hello. I'd like to book a room for two nights, please.
Receptionist: Single or double?
Guest: A double room, from the fifteenth to the seventeenth of March.
Receptionist: That's £120 per night. Breakfast is included.
Guest: Perfect. I'll take it.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The guest wants a room for [*two|one|three] nights.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen again and choose the correct option.

questions.text: The guest books from the fifteenth to the ____ of March. | *seventeenth | twentieth | tenth
The hotel is called the ____ Hotel. | *Grand | Royal | City
The guest says: 'I'll ____ it.' | *take | leave | change
The receptionist asks: 'Single or ____?' | *double | twin | suite

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Listen and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: The call is to [*book|cancel|change] a room.
